shortDescription: IRCC visitor record · Extend stay in Canada · Temporary resident status

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current visitor record fee, processing time, and maintained status guidance on canada.ca before counseling.

alert.title: Visitor record is not a visa
alert.body: A visitor record extends or changes status inside Canada. It does not replace a TRV or eTA for re-entry.

about.label: Description
about.value: Visitor record application for temporary residents already in Canada who need to extend their stay as visitors or change conditions from another temporary status.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: In Canada · Valid temporary resident status or restoration eligibility · Genuine temporary purpose · Funds for stay · Clear departure or next-status plan

about.label: Important limitation
about.value: Visitor record does not authorize work or long-term study and does not guarantee re-entry after travel outside Canada.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Client receives a document with a new status expiry date. Review conditions and calendar the next exit or extension deadline.

eligibility.criterion: Current visitor, student, or worker status is valid or restorable
eligibility.note: Check original entry date and permit expiry

eligibility.criterion: Clear temporary reason for extended stay
Proof of funds for extended visit
No unauthorized work or study planned
Ties outside Canada or credible departure plan
Passport valid for requested stay period
Prior status history and refusals disclosed

redFlagsBanner: Visitor record files are refused when the reason for staying longer is vague, funds are weak, or the client appears to be living in Canada without a temporary plan.

redFlags.title: Vague extension reason
redFlags.description: Client says only they want to stay longer without dates, purpose, or supporting evidence.
redFlags.fix: Document visit purpose, timeline, funds, and departure or next-status plan

redFlags.title: Status already expired
redFlags.description: Client missed the allowed stay or permit expiry date.
redFlags.fix: Assess restoration eligibility and stop unauthorized activities

redFlags.title: Working as visitor
redFlags.description: Evidence suggests unauthorized employment or remote work issue.
redFlags.fix: Escalate before filing and prepare honest disclosure strategy

redFlags.title: Weak funds
redFlags.description: Insufficient money for accommodation, food, insurance, and return travel.
redFlags.fix: Add bank history, sponsor letter, host proof, and budget explanation

redFlags.title: Long serial extensions
redFlags.description: Multiple back-to-back visitor records with no clear temporary end point.
redFlags.fix: Explain exceptional need or assess a more suitable immigration pathway

redFlags.title: TRV confusion
redFlags.description: Client believes visitor record allows re-entry after travel.
redFlags.fix: Explain visitor record vs TRV/eTA in writing before submission

redFlags.title: Passport expiring
redFlags.description: Requested stay goes beyond passport validity.
redFlags.fix: Renew passport first where timeline allows

faqs.q: Is a visitor record the same as a visitor visa?
faqs.a: No. A visitor record extends status inside Canada. A TRV or eTA is used for travel to Canada.

faqs.q: When should a visitor record be filed?
faqs.a: File before the authorized stay expires. For entry without a stamp, calculate the default stay carefully unless another date was given.

faqs.q: Can the client work on a visitor record?
faqs.a: No. A visitor record does not authorize work unless a separate policy or permit applies.

faqs.q: Can the client study on a visitor record?
faqs.a: Only limited short-term study may be allowed in specific cases. Do not advise long-term study without a study permit.

faqs.q: Can the client leave Canada while it is processing?
faqs.a: Travel can abandon the practical purpose of the application and re-entry requires a valid TRV/eTA if applicable. Review before travel.

faqs.q: How long should we request?
faqs.a: Request a reasonable period supported by purpose, funds, insurance, and passport validity. Avoid arbitrary long requests.

faqs.q: What if the client is waiting for another application?
faqs.a: Explain the pending application and include proof, but still show temporary intent and funds.

faqs.q: Can parents of students extend as visitors?
faqs.a: Yes, if they show a genuine temporary purpose, funds, accommodation, and intention to leave or maintain legal status.

faqs.q: What if the client has a prior refusal?
faqs.a: Disclose it and address the refusal reason. Do not refile with the same weak explanation.

faqs.q: Does approval guarantee future entry to Canada?
faqs.a: No. Border entry is assessed separately, and a visitor record does not replace travel authorization.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Visitor record application for temporary residents already in Canada who need to extend their stay as visitors or change conditions from another temporary status.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: In Canada · Valid temporary resident status or restoration eligibility · Genuine temporary purpose · Funds for stay · Clear departure or next-status plan

faqs.q: What is Important limitation for this service?
faqs.a: Visitor record does not authorize work or long-term study and does not guarantee re-entry after travel outside Canada.

faqs.q: Important note on Important limitation?
faqs.a: Visitor record does not authorize work or long-term study and does not guarantee re-entry after travel outside Canada.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC)

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Client receives a document with a new status expiry date. Review conditions and calendar the next exit or extension deadline.

faqs.q: Is Client is physically in Canada required?
faqs.a: Client is physically in Canada is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Current visitor, student, or worker status is valid or restorable required?
faqs.a: Check original entry date and permit expiry

faqs.q: Is Clear temporary reason for extended stay required?
faqs.a: Clear temporary reason for extended stay is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Proof of funds for extended visit required?
faqs.a: Proof of funds for extended visit is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Accommodation or host support evidence required?
faqs.a: Accommodation or host support evidence is typically required.

faqs.q: Is No unauthorized work or study planned required?
faqs.a: No unauthorized work or study planned is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Ties outside Canada or credible departure plan required?
faqs.a: Ties outside Canada or credible departure plan is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Passport valid for requested stay period required?
faqs.a: Passport valid for requested stay period is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Prior status history and refusals disclosed required?
faqs.a: Prior status history and refusals disclosed is typically required.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 2–4m — Check IRCC

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: CAD $100 — Verify on canada.ca

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 89% — ~80% benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 9 — + reason for stay

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt only

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never imply visitor record authorizes work or long-term study
Never guarantee approval or future re-entry
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Calculate visitor expiry from stamp, visitor record, or six-month default carefully
Prepare a one-page stay plan with purpose, dates, funds, and exit plan
Use host documents only when they genuinely support accommodation and expenses
Warn clients in writing that visitor record is not a travel visa
Escalate serial extensions before filing another weak visitor request
Include travel insurance when medical or elderly visitor risk is relevant
postApproval: Send visitor record expiry date and conditions to client
Explain no work or unauthorized study in writing
Calendar next departure or extension deadline
Confirm TRV/eTA needs before any travel outside Canada
Review next-status plan if client is waiting for family, study, or work application

timeline.title: Funds, host, travel, and explanation documents

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Always explain that visitor record extends in-Canada status only. Re-entry requires separate travel authorization.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about what a visitor record is is correct?
options: A visitor record is an inside-Canada status document that authorizes a visitor to remain longer.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: It is proof of visitor status in Canada, not a travel visa.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about visitor record versus TRV is correct?
options: A visitor record extends stay in Canada, while a TRV allows a visa-required person to travel to Canada.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Confusing status and entry documents is a common error.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about who applies is correct?
options: A person in Canada as a visitor applies when they want to remain beyond their authorized stay.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: The application is made before current visitor status expires whenever possible.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about application fee is correct?
options: The standard fee to extend stay as a visitor is CAD $100.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: The visitor record fee is distinct from biometrics or restoration fees.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about maintained status is correct?
options: A timely visitor record application can allow the person to remain in Canada under the same conditions while waiting.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Maintained status applies when a complete extension is filed before expiry.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about work prohibition is correct?
options: A visitor record does not authorize work in Canada.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Visitors must obtain work authorization unless an exemption applies.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about study limits is correct?
options: A visitor record generally does not authorize long-term study beyond visitor study exemptions.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Most programs over six months require a study permit.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about authorized stay after entry is correct?
options: Many visitors receive up to six months unless CBSA stamps a different date or issues a record.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: The person's actual deadline depends on entry documents and officer decisions.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about proof of funds is correct?
options: The applicant must show enough money to support the extended stay and leave Canada.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Visitor extensions still require financial sufficiency.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about reason for extension is correct?
options: A clear temporary reason, such as more tourism, family support, or changed travel plans, should be documented.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: IRCC assesses why more time is needed.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about passport validity is correct?
options: A visitor record cannot normally be issued beyond the passport expiry date.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Passport validity can limit the requested extension.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about medical insurance is correct?
options: Insurance is not always mandatory for ordinary visitor records but can support longer stays and medical-risk concerns.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Health coverage helps show the person can manage costs while visiting.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about family in Canada is correct?
options: Family support can explain the visit but does not remove the need for temporary intent.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: IRCC still asks whether the visitor will leave when required.

quiz.question: In a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, which statement about restoration is correct?
options: If visitor status expired, restoration may be needed instead of a simple extension.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.
quiz.explanation: Restoration carries different requirements and fees.

options: Restoration is generally available only within 90 days after status is lost.
It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.

It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.
It is only reviewed after the applicant becomes a permanent resident.

It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.

It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.

It is optional if the applicant writes a detailed cover letter.
It automatically guarantees entry to Canada once the form is submitted.

It can be ignored if the applicant has previously held Canadian status.
quiz.explanation: Maintained status ends when the refusal is made.

quiz.question: For a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, what is the correct process point about address updates?
options: The applicant should keep their Canadian mailing address current with IRCC.
It should be uploaded only after IRCC has already made the final decision.
It is replaced by buying a return ticket or submitting a travel itinerary.
It can be ignored if the applicant has previously held Canadian status.
quiz.explanation: Visitor records and requests may depend on correct contact details.

quiz.question: For a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, what is the correct process point about support from abroad?
options: If foreign income supports the stay, documents should show continued employment, leave, or remote funds source.
It should be uploaded only after IRCC has already made the final decision.
It is replaced by buying a return ticket or submitting a travel itinerary.
It can be ignored if the applicant has previously held Canadian status.
quiz.explanation: Foreign ties can support both funds and departure intent.

quiz.question: For a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, what is the correct process point about document translations?
options: Non-English or non-French evidence should include certified translations.
It should be uploaded only after IRCC has already made the final decision.
It is replaced by buying a return ticket or submitting a travel itinerary.
It can be ignored if the applicant has previously held Canadian status.

quiz.question: For a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada, what is the correct process point about webform updates?
options: Material changes such as a new passport or changed departure date should be updated through proper IRCC channels.
It should be uploaded only after IRCC has already made the final decision.
It is replaced by buying a return ticket or submitting a travel itinerary.
It can be ignored if the applicant has previously held Canadian status.
quiz.explanation: The officer should decide on current and accurate facts.

quiz.question: Officer perspective in a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada: what is the key issue with using visitor status to live in Canada?
options: Repeated long extensions can make the officer conclude the person is residing in Canada rather than visiting.
It is harmless because officers approve cases when the applicant is polite.
It can be fixed after refusal by sending documents to the visa office informally.
It matters only at the airport and not during the paper or online review.
quiz.explanation: Visitor status is temporary and limited in purpose.

quiz.question: Officer perspective in a visitor record application to extend stay in Canada: what is the key issue with applying after expiry?
options: A late application cannot create maintained status and may require restoration.
It is harmless because officers approve cases when the applicant is polite.
It can be fixed after refusal by sending documents to the visa office informally.
It matters only at the airport and not during the paper or online review.
quiz.explanation: The status timeline is often the first issue the officer checks.

dos: Document a clear temporary stay reason
donts: Do not say visitor record allows work
Do not treat visitor record as a re-entry visa
Do not file serial extensions without strategy
Do not hide prior refusals or overstays
Do not request unsupported long stays

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)

sampleDocs.description: Evidence used to calculate authorized stay.

sampleDocs.description: Host PR card, citizenship proof, or valid permit as applicable.

applicant.summary: Visitor visa (TRV) / super visa generally does not authorize work in Canada. Super visa allows extended stays with parents/grandparents of citizens/PRs but still no employment.
details: Business visitor activities are limited — distinguish from work requiring work permit.
Super visa requires medical insurance and sponsor income proof.
restrictions: Study beyond short course may need study permit

spouse.summary: Spouse accompanying on visitor status cannot work unless they separately obtain an eligible work permit or change status.
details: If spouse intends to work, assess study permit + SOWP or work permit pathways instead of visitor.
restrictions: Visitor record does not grant work rights

fullCostBreakdown.title: Full cost breakdown — Canada – Visitor Record (In-Canada Extension)
fullCostBreakdown.disclaimer: Indicative costs for counselor discussions only. Government fees, tuition, and living amounts change — verify on official websites before quoting clients. Exchange rates affect INR equivalents.

totals.label: Indicative first-year budget (excl. tuition band)
totals.value: Counselor to calculate from sections above
totals.notes: Always cross-check LOA/CAS/Offer of Place and official fee pages before client commitment.
